original_registry_entry.issuing_organisation: National Institute for Health and Care Excellence
original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: Self-harm: assessment, management and preventing recurrence
original_registry_entry.jurisdiction: England and Wales; requires UAE legal and pathway adaptation
original_registry_entry.population: Children, young people and adults who have self-harmed, unless a recommendation is age-specific.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Community, emergency department, hospital and mental-health care following self-harm.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for compassionate psychosocial assessment, emergency-department initial assessment, immediate safety, safeguarding, willingness for physical and mental care, care-plan status, observation and discharge documentation after self-harm. It does not apply a risk score, predict suicide or generate treatment.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations 1.5.1–1.5.17 — psychosocial assessment and care
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports recording the person’s needs, concerns, strengths, vulnerabilities, context and clinician-performed psychosocial assessment without using a prediction score.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations 1.7.12–1.7.20 — emergency-department initial assessment and care
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting injury severity, emotional and mental state, distress, immediate safety, safeguarding, willingness for care, observation and care-plan status in the ED.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations 1.3.1–1.3.2 and 1.9.6 — safeguarding and discharge
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports recording safeguarding consideration and clinician-confirmed assessment, plan, communication and follow-up before discharge after self-harm.

title: Self-harm: assessment, management and preventing recurrence
publisher: National Institute for Health and Care Excellence
jurisdiction: England and Wales; requires UAE legal and pathway adaptation
population: Children, young people and adults who have self-harmed, unless a recommendation is age-specific.
intended_setting: Community, emergency department, hospital and mental-health care following self-harm.
